/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/src/mib10_crypto.c.o CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/src/mib10_activity.c.o CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/src/mib10_bluez.c.o CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/src/mib10_wire.c.o CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/src/mib10_ui.c.o CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/src/gb_db.c.o "CMakeFiles/libreband.dir/src/xiaomi.pb-c.c.o" -o libreband  /usr/lib/libbluetooth.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -lm /usr/lib/libadwaita-1.so /usr/lib/libgtk-4.so /usr/lib/libpangocairo-1.0.so /usr/lib/libpango-1.0.so /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so /usr/lib/libcairo-gobject.so /usr/lib/libcairo.so /usr/lib/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/libgraphene-1.0.so /usr/lib/libgio-2.0.so /usr/lib/libgobject-2.0.so /usr/lib/libglib-2.0.so /usr/lib/libprotobuf-c.so /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so
